content: Dgraph DQL supports first/offset/after pagination. 'after: UID' skips in constant O(1) time regardless of position, while 'offset: N' is O(N) and degrades on large datasets. For exporting an entire predicate/edge list (tens of millions of edges), the recommended approach is cursor-style paging using first:N + after:lastUID, walking UID order. Corroborated by official Dgraph pagination docs and community discussion.
